characters.description: A powerful leader, Grandmaster Alchemist, and veteran combatant whose damaged soul remains a serious constraint. He enters this volume supported by trusted companions and several independent allies who reside within his mind.
characters.name: Ruwen Starfield

characters.description: Ruwen's partner, healer, and protector. She is a trusted companion whose unusual sensitivity to abstract magic and conceptual power gives her insights that Ruwen's more structured thinking does not easily reach.
characters.name: Hamma

characters.description: Ruwen's trusted martial companion and Lylan's partner. He travels with an elder tortoise.
characters.name: Sift

characters.description: A dangerous scout, Sift's partner, and one of Ruwen's established allies. She has unusual blood and uses hexing magic.
characters.name: Lylan

characters.description: Ruwen's close mind-linked ally, investigator, and adviser. She can research problems from within his mental world.
characters.name: Rami

characters.description: A practical community ally with herbal and alchemical knowledge.
characters.name: Bliz

characters.description: A capable and practical ally in Ruwen's circle.
characters.name: Big D

characters.description: An ally with extensive knowledge of the Shadow Realm and the discipline known as Shadow Step.
characters.name: Kai

characters.description: An autonomous intelligence living within Ruwen's mind. Lir has independent judgment and supports civic and system work.
characters.name: Lir

characters.description: Ruwen's inner-world double and a distinct ally with combat and planning responsibilities. Overlord can advise Ruwen, conduct research with the other mind-resident entities, and manifest externally under suitable conditions.
characters.name: Overlord

characters.description: A researcher concerned with restoring or preserving powerful beings. At the start of this volume, his work remains tied to unresolved questions about souls, godstones, and whether damaged or lost forms can be recovered.
characters.name: Fractal

characters.description: A deity and political ally who supports Ruwen and remains connected to members of his inner world.
characters.name: Ruwen's allied goddess

characters.description: An inner-world ally carrying knowledge retained from Eiru and assisting with Ruwen's inner-world defense.
characters.name: Eiru-derived avatar

characters.description: Ruwen's principal established enemy, tied to a continuing threat that extends across realms.
characters.name: Infernal Lord

characters.description: A hostile internal entity associated with the Infernal Lord. Nameless poses a threat through mental intrusion and destructive influence, making the entity dangerous even without a conventional body or open battlefield presence.
characters.name: Nameless

characters.description: The Black Pyramid's patron, usually encountered in her dungeon form. When the situation becomes serious she takes the human form Miranda, and she begins this volume by rewarding Sift for helping save the planet.
characters.name: Blapy

characters.description: A mistwraith and former Black Pyramid opponent who ends his opposition and agrees to advise a diplomatic effort involving two neighboring countries.
characters.name: Talker

characters.description: A priestess of Naktos who is identified as the sculptor Ruwen maimed while rescuing Lylan.
characters.name: Naktos priestess

characters.description: Hamma's pendant-linked golem companion, who is nearly impossible to kill. Ruwen owes him for recovering the apocalypse hoop.
characters.name: Archie

characters.description: A librarian and researcher drawn to dangerous knowledge. Ruwen recruits this specialist for the alchemy competition and secures an agreement for lessons in within-realm translocation.
characters.name: Unnamed librarian-researcher

characters.description: A sentient weapon carried by Sift. The end of the Pact removes a former restriction and allows it to speak directly into Ruwen's mind.
characters.name: Elder dagger

characters.description: The Black Pyramid's chef, who asks to join Ruwen's expedition and is accepted on the condition that meals and desserts continue. Beyond cooking, the chef may also have access to restricted information.
characters.name: Culinary genie

characters.description: A powerful and renowned bard whom Lylan now accepts with caution. He apologizes for his earlier actions and offers to teach Ruwen a more emotional, less linear way of perceiving harmonic patterns.
characters.name: Lylan's grandfather

characters.description: The concealed identity Ruwen uses when his expedition enters the Tournament of Perfection. The disguise presents him as the leader of a mercenary company while withholding his political and divine significance from rival alchemists.
characters.name: Nightshade

characters.description: Sift's parents, a married pair of Black Pyramid Master Alchemists who join the expedition in concealment.
characters.name: Sift's parents

characters.description: A hostile Grandmaster Alchemist who disputes Nightshade's legitimacy and challenges his small party. He commands an established camp and quickly turns the tournament into a personal contest backed by wagers and intimidation.
characters.name: Rival Grandmaster

characters.description: The six Muses occupying thrones when Nightshade reaches the Tournament of Perfection. They oversee the contest and examine his party without uncovering his identity, while three other thrones stand empty.
characters.name: Six present Muses

characters.description: The rival Grandmaster's divine patron, summoned after the alchemical dispute escalates. The deity enters prepared to intimidate Ruwen, then recognizes him and retreats through an amulet-based escape.
characters.name: Rival's tree deity

characters.description: An autonomous aspect within Ruwen's armor that reacts eagerly to the Destruction Realm. It can suppress his conspicuous shadow there, but its independent desire to remain introduces uncertainty into his control of the armor.
characters.name: Scarecrow aspect

characters.description: A distinct mind-resident Grandmaster Alchemist who prepares lessons for Ruwen's effort to spread advanced instruction. Her expertise lets the teaching program continue even when rival Grandmasters try to isolate their students.
characters.name: Arcanum

characters.description: The acting sovereign of the Destruction Realm, seen in a Muse's memory on an island dominated by five towers. The sovereign possesses the stolen potions and has offered protection as part of a dangerous bargain.
characters.name: Havoc Sovereign

characters.description: Rami's means of escape when the Infernal Lord's force reaches the island of five towers. Ruwen sends Rami away on Vex and uses one of Blapy's single-use protections to shield their departure.
characters.name: Vex

characters.description: A destruction-aligned universe harvester associated with the Destruction Emperor. The Inquisitor offers the Infernal Lord a transformation into a form accepted by the realm, making it central to his plan for survival.
characters.name: Chaos Tower Inquisitor

characters.description: The identity Ruwen gives his new noble seraph body after his original form is destroyed. His consciousness remains continuous, but the system treats the House Valdor body as a new profile and leaves Ruwen Starfield's profile inaccessible.
characters.name: Ruin Valdor
